ticket.subject: supabase-js v2.45 missing TypeScript types for RealtimePostgresChangesPayload
ticket.body: After upgrading to @supabase/supabase-js@2.45.0 our TS build fails because RealtimePostgresChangesPayload is no longer exported from the entry index. Did the type move to a subpath? The changelog doesn't mention it. We're pinned to 2.44 as a workaround.
